'''Jiroch-Kalok''', also known as '''Kalok''', was a [[Planet/Legends|world]] situated within the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Yushan sector/Legends|Yushan sector]]. The planet was [[Colonist/Legends|colonized]] by the [[Hunting/Legends|hunting]]-oriented [[Tunroth]] [[Species/Legends|species]] at some point after they had received [[Technology level|galactic-level technology]]. Jiroch-Kalok, together with the [[Jiroch system/Legends|Jiroch system's]] other worlds [[Jiroch-Reslia]] and [[Jiroch-Saloch]], were referred to by [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] as the [[Triumvirate (planets)|Triumvirate]]. A number of [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] also settled on the planet, leaving a strong influence on its architecture.

==Description==
Jiroch-Kalok,<ref name="UAA">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref> also known as Kalok, was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that occupied the fourth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position in the [[Jiroch system/Legends|Jiroch system]]<ref name="GG12" /> within the [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]] portion of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]]<ref name="TEA" /> [[Yushan sector/Legends|Yushan sector]].<ref name="Yushan" /> The [[Star system/Legends|system]] was connected to the [[Dalisor system/Legends|Dalisor system]] and the<ref name="TEA" /> [[Bruanii sector/Legends|Bruanii sector's]]<ref name="TEA Companion">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> [[Quamar system/Legends|Quamar system]] via the [[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Spine]] [[Super-hyperroute/Legends|hyperlane]].<ref name="TEA" />

==History==
[[File:ReslianPurge-XWingRogueSquadron25.jpg|thumb|right|270px|In the Reslian Purge, the Lortan Fanatics (a member depicted on the bottom left) attacked the Jiroch system.]]
[[Millennium/Legends|Millennia]] prior to the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Tunroth]] [[Species/Legends|species]], [[Homeworld/Legends|hailing]] from the Jiroch system planet [[Jiroch-Reslia]], became a member of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], in the process gaining access to [[Technology level|galactic-level technology]]<ref name="GG12" /> and developing [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] technology.<ref name="UAA" /> As a result, they [[Colonist/Legends|colonized]] the Jiroch system planets Jiroch-Kalok and [[Jiroch-Saloch]]. Jiroch-Kalok, together with Jiroch-Saloch and Jiroch-Reslia, were often referred to by [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] as the [[Triumvirate (planets)|Triumvirate]] as a dedication to the [[Assemblage of Three]].<ref name="GG12" /> Consisting of the three highest-level Tunroth [[Hunting/Legends|hunters]], the Assemblage governed Tunroth society,<ref name="UAA" /> promoting Jiroch-Kalok and Jiroch-Saloch's simultaneous colonization.<ref name="GG12" /> Many members of the [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] species also settled on both worlds for a [[Time/Legends|time]] and greatly influenced the local architecture.<ref name="GMR" />

In [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]],<ref name="UAA" /> during the event named the [[Reslian Purge]], the expansionist [[Lortan Fanatics]] attacked the Jiroch system.<ref name="GG12" /> As the Tunroth were unable to repel them with their primitive technology, millions of Tunroth [[Death/Legends|died]],<ref name="UAA" /> and their population was reduced to four million. When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] intervened, the fanatics were thwarted and further attacks were halted. Following the massacre, reconstruction efforts were underway on the three Jiroch system worlds.<ref name="GG12" />

==Inhabitants==
Colonizing Jiroch-Kalok, the Tunroth species developed a peaceful civilization centered around hunting communities,<ref name="GG12" /> hunters being the most respected in Tunroth society.<ref name="UAA" /> They developed sparse technology beyond simple animal power before joining the Republic and receiving the technology that paved the way for Jiroch-Kalok's colonization. However, even when they possessed such technology, few Tunroth traveled [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], as many had returned to their home system to assist in the rebuilding effort. They lived in communes of between roughly fifty and three hundred individuals, a tracker leading each of them.<ref name="GG12" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jiroch-Kalok was first mentioned in an entry written by [[Craig Robert Carey|C. Robert Carey]] for ''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]'', a [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] supplement for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' published by [[West End Games]] in [[1995]]. Initially identified as Kalok,<ref name="GG12" /> ''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'', a [[2003]] supplement for [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', provided the planet's full name.<ref name="UAA" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Jiroch system, and therefore Jiroch-Kalok, in grid square K-17.<ref name="TEA" />
